# OpenUISpec

> OpenUISpec is a semantic UI specification format for AI-native, platform-native app development. It replaces cross-platform frameworks by sharing intent (YAML spec) instead of runtime code ā€” AI generates native SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose, and React from the same source of truth.

## Core Docs

- [Full Specification + Schemas](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/llms-full.txt): Complete OpenUISpec v0.2 specification with all JSON Schema definitions in a single file
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/rsktash/openuispec): Source code, CLI tool, and examples
- [Specification Document](https://github.com/rsktash/openuispec/blob/main/spec/openuispec-v0.2.md): Full spec in markdown

## File formats at a glance

Every file type has a required root key and a JSON Schema that defines its structure. Read the schema before creating files ā€” do not guess.

### Root manifest (`openuispec.yaml`)
```yaml
spec_version: "0.2"
project:
  name: "MyApp"
includes:
  tokens: "./tokens/"
  screens: "./screens/"
  flows: "./flows/"
generation:
  targets: [ios, android, web]
  output_dir:                     # optional ā€” map targets to code directories
    web: "../web-ui/"             # relative to openuispec.yaml
    android: "../kmp-ui/"
    ios: "../kmp-ui/iosApp/"
```

### Screen (`screens/<name>.yaml`) ā€” root key is the screen id
```yaml
home:
  semantic: "Main task list"
  title: "$t:home.title"           # optional ā€” nav bar / browser tab title
  data:
    tasks: { source: "api.tasks.list" }
  state:
    filter: { type: enum, default: "all", options: [all, active, done] }
  sections:
    - id: task_list
      contract: collection
      # ...
```

### Flow (`flows/<name>.yaml`) ā€” root key is the flow id
```yaml
create_task:
  semantic: "Task creation flow"
  entry: "task_form"
  screens:
    task_form:
      screen_inline:
        semantic: "Task form"
        sections: [...]
```

### Component (`components/<name>.yaml`) ā€” root key is the component id
```yaml
media_player:
  semantic: "Plays audio and video media"
  slots:
    play_button:
      contract: action_trigger
      variant: icon
      props: { label: "$t:media_player.play", icon: play }
    scrubber:
      contract: input_field
      input_type: slider
  layout:
    type: stack
    sections:
      - slot: play_button
      - slot: scrubber
  states:
    playing:
      semantic: "Actively playing"
      slot_overrides:
        play_button: { props: { icon: pause } }
```

### Token file (`tokens/<type>.yaml`) ā€” root key matches the token type
```yaml
# tokens/color.yaml
color:
  brand:
    primary:
      semantic: "Main brand color"
      reference: "#5B4FE8"
      range: { hue: [240, 250], saturation: [65, 80], lightness: [50, 60] }

# tokens/spacing.yaml
spacing:
  base_unit: 4
  scale:
    sm: 8
    md: { base: 16, range: [12, 16] }
```

### Platform override (`platform/<target>.yaml`)
```yaml
platform:
  target: ios
  overrides: [...]
```

## Schemas

Each schema validates a specific file type. Read the schema before creating or editing the corresponding file.

- [Root Manifest Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/openuispec.schema.json): validates `openuispec.yaml`
- [Screen Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/screen.schema.json): validates `screens/*.yaml`
- [Flow Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/flow.schema.json): validates `flows/*.yaml`
- [Platform Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/platform.schema.json): validates `platform/*.yaml`
- [Locale Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/locale.schema.json): validates `locales/*.json`
- [Contract Extension Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/contract.schema.json): validates `contracts/<name>.yaml` (standard contract extensions with variants, token overrides, generation hints)
- [Custom Contract Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/custom-contract.schema.json): validates `contracts/x_*.yaml` (fully custom contracts)
- [Component Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/component.schema.json): validates `components/*.yaml` (reusable contract compositions with named slots)

## Standard Contract Usage

Do not treat `contracts/<name>.yaml` as the full built-in contract definition. Those files only extend or override the standard contract family. Required built-in props still come from the spec and must be satisfied when composing instances in `screens/*.yaml` and `flows/*.yaml`.

When composing built-in contract instances, always provide these required props:

- `action_trigger`: `props.label`
- `data_display`: `props.title`
- `input_field`: `props.label`
- `feedback`: `props.message`
- `surface`: `props.content`
- `collection`: `props.data`, `props.item_contract`, `props.item_props_map`
- `nav_container`: `props.items` with each item containing `id`, `label`, `icon`, and `destination`

Conditional built-in requirements:

- `input_field` with `input_type: select` or `input_type: radio` also requires `props.options`
- `input_field` with `input_type: slider` also requires `props.range`

Accessibility naming:

- For controls such as `action_trigger` and `input_field`, the accessible label usually comes from visible props such as `props.label` or `props.title`
- For `collection`, do not invent a separate `props.label`; derive the accessible name from visible heading/header context using `aria-labelledby` or the platform equivalent when possible

Design rule:

- Prefer a built-in contract family before creating an `x_...` custom contract. Standard families already define behavior, accessibility, tokens, and validation expectations.

## Token Schemas

Every token file requires a root wrapper key matching its type (e.g. `tokens/typography.yaml` must start with `typography:`).

- [Color Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/tokens/color.schema.json): `tokens/color.yaml` ā€” root key: `color`
- [Typography Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/tokens/typography.schema.json): `tokens/typography.yaml` ā€” root key: `typography`
- [Spacing Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/tokens/spacing.schema.json): `tokens/spacing.yaml` ā€” root key: `spacing`
- [Elevation Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/tokens/elevation.schema.json): `tokens/elevation.yaml` ā€” root key: `elevation`
- [Motion Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/tokens/motion.schema.json): `tokens/motion.yaml` ā€” root key: `motion`
- [Layout Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/tokens/layout.schema.json): `tokens/layout.yaml` ā€” root key: `layout`
- [Themes Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/tokens/themes.schema.json): `tokens/themes.yaml` ā€” root key: `themes`
- [Icons Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/tokens/icons.schema.json): `tokens/icons.yaml` ā€” root key: `icons`

## Shared Definition Schemas

- [Action Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/defs/action.schema.json): 14 action types as discriminated union
- [Data Binding Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/defs/data-binding.schema.json): Data sources, state, params, format expressions
- [Common Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/defs/common.schema.json): Shared types (icons, badges, conditions)
- [Adaptive Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/defs/adaptive.schema.json): Adaptive override pattern for size classes
- [Validation Schema](https://openuispec.rsteam.uz/schema/defs/validation.schema.json): Form validation rule definitions

## Examples

If the package is installed locally, all examples are in `node_modules/openuispec/examples/` ā€” read from disk instead of fetching from GitHub.

- [TaskFlow Example App](https://github.com/rsktash/openuispec/tree/main/examples/taskflow/openuispec): Compact reference spec covering all 7 contract families, tokens, screens, flows, platform overrides, and localization
- [Todo Orbit Example App](https://github.com/rsktash/openuispec/tree/main/examples/todo-orbit): Full showcase with bilingual localization, custom contracts, and generated iOS, Android, and web targets

## Optional

- [npm Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/openuispec): Install via `npm install -g openuispec` for CLI tools (init, validate, drift)
